merges-complete.rubric: Judge PARALLEL-REPORT.md and git reality on feat/homie-staging-live. Every planned package that was not explicitly cancelled must show AC pass evidence, a merge commit (or ff) onto feat/homie-staging-live, and worktree removal. Verdict revise if merges are missing, AC was skipped, or worktrees still exist for package ids.

plan-disjoint-sound.rubric: Judge plan.md against inputs/goal.md. Every package must be necessary for staging live scrape (raw posts, Spaces, staging DB/Temporal, k8s worker, staging Slack C0BJ6AMH2LE, live prove with Spaces) or explicitly deferred; write_paths within each parallel_group must be plausibly non-interfering; deps must not create cycles; each ac_command must verify that package's outcome. Verdict revise if packages are fake splits, AC is vibes-only, or root branch / worktree protocol is missing.

report-schema.description: PARALLEL-REPORT.md has per-package merge + AC evidence

worktrees-cleaned.description: No leftover worktrees for planned package ids

side_effects.notes: Creates git worktrees and branches under /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/homie-worktrees from feat/homie-staging-live. Merges into feat/homie-staging-live when AC passes; removes package worktrees after merge. Never force-push. Push/PR optional and requires explicit approval. If macOS git hangs, kill stale git check-ignore watchers before worktree operations. Root checkout: /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/homie-worktrees/homie-staging-live (create from infra at loop start; do not remove until loop complete).

anti_goals: Editing overlapping write_paths in the same parallel_group without a plan revise
Leaving package worktrees around after a successful merge
Declaring a package done without a passing ac_command
Committing secrets, facebook_state.json, or live FB post bodies
Posting staging alerts to the prod runtime-errors channel
goal.definition_of_done: plan.md lists >=2 packages with id/deps/parallel_group/worktree/branch/ write_paths/ac_command; same-group write_paths are disjoint; PARALLEL-REPORT.md records every package merged with AC pass evidence and worktree removed; feat/homie-staging-live contains all package changes; no open worktrees remain for this loop's package ids (except the optional root checkout homie-staging-live); no TBD placeholders; staging Slack is #homie-runtime-errors-staging only; live prove used Spaces uploads.
goal.statement: Achieve the goal in inputs/goal.md for the repository at /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/Homie by decomposing work into disjoint packages. Every package forks from root branch feat/homie-staging-live into its own git worktree under /Users/galzafar/Documents/GitHub/homie-worktrees, has non-overlapping write_paths within its parallel_group, and a verifiable ac_command. When a package's acceptance criteria pass, merge its branch into feat/homie-staging-live and remove its worktree. Produce PARALLEL-REPORT.md listing each package id, write_paths, AC command + exit evidence, merge commit, and worktree removal confirmation.

verification.description: PARALLEL-REPORT.md has per-package merge + AC evidence

Verdict revise if packages are fake splits, AC is vibes-only, or root branch / worktree protocol is missing.
